judgment.summary: Workday offers high growth and strong cash generation at a highly attractive valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 2.47 beat the 2.32 estimate; next earnings date is 2026-05-21.
positives: PEG ratio 0.46 — suggests the stock is undervalued relative to its growth.
Forward P/E 9.54 vs trailing 45.85 — indicates significant expected earnings expansion.
Gross margin 75.7% — reflects high core profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) $3.01B — demonstrates strong cash generation.
negatives: Profit margin 7.3% — indicates relatively thin bottom-line conversion.
Operating margin 12.0% — shows moderate operational efficiency.
Return on assets 3.6% — indicates low asset utilization efficiency.

news.paragraph: Workday is aggressively integrating AI capabilities through new Microsoft 365 Copilot features and various industry partnerships. While Argus Research recently lowered its price target to $131.00 and the stock has recently lagged behind broader market gains, the company continues to receive leadership recognition in the talent acquisition space. Options traders should weigh these technological advancements against recent price underperformance.
